publisher: USDA Forest Service Research Data Archive
notes: Age is defined by the source as years since planted.
The Northeast sugar-maple DBH-to-age equation has n=16.
The regional raw sample contains 31 sugar maples with DBH from 2.5 to 105.7 cm, but its raw age values are missing sentinels; use the published coefficient row for age estimation.
This urban model must remain separate from the forest-derived FIA model.
